title: Evo: Amped Up
description: An addon for the Ben 10 mod "Alien Evolution" that adds two more aliens: Fasttrack & Feedback.
body:
![Amped Up Logo W/ Fasttrack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0d62b766ce89319772285e738dcf4a59b40b2d9_0.webp)
Evo: Amped Up is an extension to the mod "Alien Evolution" by KonaDolomite, that adds more alien transformations.

# Join the discord for teasers!

[EAU Discord](https://discord.gg/J5x9kCAzYf)

# FEATURES
## COMMANDS
- /ampedconfig - has configs such as tail for fasttrack

## Fasttrack - Obtained by locating a furball in a Citrakayah Temple.
### SPORTS MODE DISABLED
- Enable Sports Mode
- Uppercut 
- [CROUCH]: Drop Kick
- Intangibility
- Ground Slam
- Right Click: Slash

### SPORTS MODE ENABLED
- Disable Sports Mode
- Dash Attack
- (CROUCH): Slide Kick
- Afterimage Strike
- Leap 
- (POST-LEAP): Cyclone Slam
- (CROUCH): Boost

### PASSIVES
- Scaredy Cat
- Body Bash

## Feedback
- heavy wip, its advised to not use him at all.

# DEPENDENCIES

*   [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
*   [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
*   [Kubejs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
*   [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
*   [Alien Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
*   [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
*   [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino)
